response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the provided lyric reference for 'Mela!'. The MC segment and 'Rettou Joutou' were manually transcribed as they were not fully detailed in the reference.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for 'Mela!'; manual transcription was applied to the talking segment (MC) and the entirety of 'Rettou Joutou'.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal bursts, with immediate transitions used for rapid speech in 'Rettou Joutou' to avoid any cascading delays.

subtitles.original: どちらが正しいのかなんて
subtitles.english: Which one of us is right...

subtitles.original: 誰にもわからないさ
subtitles.english: ...is something nobody knows.

subtitles.original: 僕らだけの世界
subtitles.english: In a world of our own,

subtitles.original: ギブとテイクさ
subtitles.english: it's give and take.

subtitles.original: 補い合えた暁には
subtitles.english: When we finally make up for each other's flaws,

subtitles.original: 同じ夢を見たい
subtitles.english: I want us to share the same dream.

subtitles.original: 君はかっこいいと苦しめて
subtitles.english: By calling you cool, I burdened you

subtitles.original: ひとりぼっちにさせたのは
subtitles.english: and left you all alone,

subtitles.original: 少し僕のせいなんだよな ごめんね
subtitles.english: which is partly my fault... I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: だけど見るべきはリアルだ
subtitles.english: But we have to look at reality.

subtitles.original: 今こそ僕が救けるんだ
subtitles.english: Now is the time for me to save you.

subtitles.original: 抱えないで
subtitles.english: Don't carry it all alone,

subtitles.original: 信じて頼ってほしいんだ
subtitles.english: I want you to believe in me and rely on me.

subtitles.original: 今なんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Isn't now the time?

subtitles.original: メラメラとたぎる
subtitles.english: Raging like a roaring fire,

subtitles.original: こんな僕にも潜む正義が
subtitles.english: there's a sense of justice hiding inside me.

subtitles.original: どうしようもない衝動に駆られて
subtitles.english: Driven by an uncontrollable impulse,

subtitles.original: ほら気付けば手を握っている
subtitles.english: look, I find myself holding your hand.

subtitles.original: ほっとけない
subtitles.english: I can't just leave you alone.

subtitles.original: そんなに荷物を背負い込んでどこへ行くの
subtitles.english: Where are you going, carrying so much baggage?

subtitles.original: ほんのちょっと僕にちょっと預けてみては？
subtitles.english: Why don't you try leaving just a little bit of it with me?

subtitles.original: こんな僕も君のヒーローになりたいのさ
subtitles.english: Even someone like me wants to be your hero.

subtitles.original: はい！皆さん！
subtitles.english: Hi, everyone!

subtitles.original: とうとう始まってしまいました！
subtitles.english: It has finally begun!

subtitles.original: 天音かなた 卒業ライブ！
subtitles.english: The Amane Kanata Graduation Live!

subtitles.original: ということでですね、こちら！
subtitles.english: And with that, look here!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグが、「#天音かなた卒業ライブ」でございますので
subtitles.english: The stream hashtag is "#AmaneKanataGraduationLive"...

subtitles.original: ぜひこちらよろしくお願いいたします！
subtitles.english: ...so please share your thoughts using it!

subtitles.original: 1曲目に歌った「Mela!」は、実は初配信で歌おうか悩んでいた楽曲だったので
subtitles.english: "Mela!", which I sang first, was actually a song I debated singing for my debut stream.

subtitles.original: ここで歌えて、すごく良かった！
subtitles.english: I'm so glad I got to perform it here!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 小さい頃からね、ヒロインよりヒーローになりたいっていうタイプだったので
subtitles.english: Since I was little, I've always wanted to be a hero rather than a heroine...

subtitles.original: そういった楽曲をたくさん歌わせていただきました
subtitles.english: ...so I wanted to sing plenty of songs like that.

subtitles.original: ありがとねみんな！拍手もありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone! Thanks for the applause, too!

subtitles.original: 次からはロックで、感情をぶつけていくようなお歌に挑戦しますので...
subtitles.english: Next, I'll be taking on rock songs where I pour out all my raw emotions...

subtitles.original: ちょっとマイクが... 調整しますので！
subtitles.english: Wait, the mic... let me adjust it!

subtitles.original: 聴いてください！「劣等上等」！
subtitles.english: Please listen! "Rettou Joutou" (Bring It On)!

subtitles.original: 劣等上等 Bring it on
subtitles.english: Bring on the inferiority! Bring it on!

subtitles.original: 列島上々 不眠症
subtitles.english: Insomnia is rising across the archipelago!

subtitles.original: 子供騙しのマセマティカ
subtitles.english: Just child's play mathematics,

subtitles.original: バレてんだってそんなんじゃプライドがない
subtitles.english: I can see right through it, you have no pride like that.

subtitles.original: お利口な化粧気取りで
subtitles.english: Acting all smart with your makeup,

subtitles.original: 髪の毛先ばっか弄りてぇ
subtitles.english: all you want to do is play with the tips of your hair.

subtitles.original: つまんね
subtitles.english: How boring.

subtitles.original: ほらもっと 間違って上等
subtitles.english: Come on, making mistakes is even better!

subtitles.original: 退屈に手をかけて
subtitles.english: Now, put an end to this boredom.

subtitles.original: ママ、やっぱダサいわ
subtitles.english: Mama, you're uncool after all.

subtitles.original: こんなところじゃ終われない
subtitles.english: I can't end in a place like this.

subtitles.original: ぬるくて気が触れそう
subtitles.english: It's so lukewarm I feel like going crazy.

subtitles.original: ごっこ遊びも 芝居も さようなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye to the make-believe and the acting.

subtitles.original: ずっとこのままでいられないさ
subtitles.english: I can't stay like this forever.

subtitles.original: ダッダッダ あたし大人になる
subtitles.english: Da-da-da, I'm becoming an adult.

subtitles.original: 酸いも甘いも噛み分けて今
subtitles.english: Experiencing both the sweet and sour parts of life now.

subtitles.original: パッパッパ 変わる時代
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa, in this changing era.

subtitles.original: 悪いことばかりじゃないでしょう
subtitles.english: It's not all bad, right?

subtitles.original: 過去も罪も罰もすべて
subtitles.english: The past, the sins, the punishments, everything...

subtitles.original: 素手で、愛で、生き抜いて新世紀
subtitles.english: ...I'll survive with my bare hands, with love, in this new century!

subtitles.original: Yeah, 挑発
subtitles.english: Yeah, provocation!

subtitles.original: あたしたちは no doubt
subtitles.english: There's no doubt about us!

subtitles.original: 緑のアイツにばっか構ってんね
subtitles.english: You're always just paying attention to that green guy.

subtitles.original: さあ burn up
subtitles.english: Come on, burn up!

subtitles.original: 生ぬるいフューチャー
subtitles.english: This lukewarm future...

subtitles.original: 回答して頂戴な
subtitles.english: ...please give me an answer.

subtitles.original: アップデート入れてどこが駄目なんですか？
subtitles.english: What's wrong with installing an update?

subtitles.original: さあバグを穿てば やっちゃってコンプライト
subtitles.english: So what if we bore into the bugs? Just go and make it light!
